LanguageData.USAC_ScenarioDebtStart.label: The Debt squad
LanguageData.USAC_ScenarioDebtStart.description: Four people tied to USAC contracts hit atmosphere in a failing drop pod line: a debt inheritor, a laid-off mech technician, a former security hand, and a frontier laborer who signed every waiver put in front of them. None of them were meant to lead a colony, but all of them were built to survive hard terms. On this rimworld, contracts mean nothing unless you can defend them.
LanguageData.USAC_ScenarioDebtStart.scenario.descript: Four people tied to USAC contracts hit atmosphere in a failing drop pod line: a debt inheritor, a laid-off mech technician, a former security hand, and a frontier laborer who signed every waiver put in front of them. None of them were meant to lead a colony, but all of them were built to survive hard terms. On this rimworld, contracts mean nothing unless you can defend them.
LanguageData.USAC_ScenarioDebtStart.scenario.name: The Debt squad
LanguageData.USAC_ScenarioDebtStart.scenario.summary: Four USAC-linked survivors: debt, layoffs, war experience, and frontier contracts forged into one desperate start.
